headline: Here's How Much It Costs To Fill A F-150 Gas Tank: Is This Playing A Role In Ford F-150 Lightning's Strong Sales?
summary: For years, the most popular vehicle in the United States has been the F-150 truck from Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F). With higher gas prices and a high cost to fill up, the F-150 could see less demand and some consumers switching to the all-electric version, the F-150 Lightning.

headline: Is Tesla Making A Robovan? Here's What Elon Musk Said
summary: Electric vehicle leader Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) has plenty for customers and investors to be excited about in the future with ramped up production of existing vehicles and the planned launches of several new vehicles like the Cybertruck and Tesla Semi.

headline: Apple Watch To Get A Pro Version Just Like iPhone Pro Models; Set To Go 'Toe-To-Toe' With Samsung
summary: Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) will soon have a Pro version of its Apple Watch, over and above the standard model, Bloomberg columnist Mark Gurman  said in his weekly Power On newsletter.

headline: What Happened To Lofi Girl? 'Y'all Better Get This Fixed'
summary: The extremely popular, chilled back, downtempo YouTube (NASDAQ: GOOGL) channel Lofi Girl has been taken down abruptly, leaving its more than 10.7 million subscribers without the music (and study buddy) they’ve come to know over the last several years.

headline: Elon Musk Says This Item Could Be The Future Of Wars
summary: The world’s richest person has weighed in on how future wars could be fought. SpaceX and Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has shared that one device could be the future for wars.

headline: 'Thor: Love And Thunder' Hammers The Box Office With a $143M Opening Weekend
summary: The Marvel Cinematic Universe has brought forth another box office bonanza as the Walt Disney Co.’s (NYSE: DIS) “Thor: Love and Thunder” commanded the U.S. box office this weekend with $143 million in ticket sales from 4,375 theaters.
